summary: Closed via EXP-365 batch (PATCH-365-D/E). ResearchGate-only URL replaced with primary DOI 10.1029/2002JA009260 (Hvožďara & Prigancová 2002, J. Geophys. Res. Space Phys. 107, "Geomagnetic effects due to an eclipse-induced low-conductivity ionospheric spot"). Crossref + OpenAlex verified. Note: the ResearchGate page 29623808 displayed a misleading title ("Solar eclipse effect on geomagnetic induction parameters") which actually belongs to a 2005 Ádám/Verö/Szendrői paper; this is now corrected. Verification-class patch; no verdict change. ISS-1976 is a duplicate of this issue and is also closed by the same patches. See findings_file batch summary_for_decider.
